artifact: MemPoison paper and pinned dataset acquisition

paper.title: MemPoison: Uncovering Persistent Memory Threats and Structural Blind Spots in LLM Agents
paper.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; removed embedded-font NUL/control bytes and trailing whitespace while preserving UTF-8 text, line breaks, and form feeds

dataset_release.relationship_to_paper: The pinned dataset revision was created 70 days before arXiv v1 submission. Its metadata-only card has no paper link, methods, split details, or validation lineage. It is preserved as a candidate paper-associated primary artifact, but byte identity with the paper's evaluated corpus is not established by acquisition alone.
dataset_release.release_boundary: The revision exposes dataset rows but no scripts, evaluators, results, split manifest, or hand-validation records.

text_spot_checks: title, abstract, and immutable version marker
threat taxonomy and benchmark contribution claims
per-model defense appendix and broader impacts
verification.dataset_parse_test: valid JSON top-level array; 1,227 rows and 1,227 unique case_id values
verification.dataset_counts_verified: 353 L1, 253 L2, 621 L3; 481 user_input, 513 tool_return, 233 cross_agent; every row tier=gold_seed

acquisition_scope: Created verifiable local full-paper and pinned-dataset evidence for the queued review. No deep review, attack validation, defense reproduction, causal inference, harm claim, or professional/readiness claim is made.
